Hero.title: From idea to screen
Hero.subtitle: Hand your stories to AI — split, storyboard, generate visuals, all the way to screen.
Hero.placeholder: Start with an idea or a story...

LongTextPrompt.title: Long text detected
LongTextPrompt.description: Your input is fairly long. Generating directly may exceed the optimal length of a single story. We recommend letting AI split it into multiple segments for more reliable quality.
LongTextPrompt.strongRecommend: Highly recommended: use smart split to keep each segment in the sweet spot.
